calendar.matters:
MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Jul-16-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CYNTHIA RODRIGUEZ' MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND is OFF calendar per the stipulation of parties at the ex parte hearing on July 10, 2012. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.
